taxonomy: Nipponocalamus estophyllus is classified under the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It belongs to the tribe Arundinarieae and is a type of bamboo. The genus Nipponocalamus is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. This bamboo is native to East Asia and is often used for its timber and ornamental value. Further classification includes the order Poales and the class Liliopsida.
